channel.title: API on Mengjie Xu
channel.description: Recent content in API on Mengjie Xu

item.title: Seeking Alpha From Investor Attention
item.description: Motivation Just like the trading imbalance could be a powerful signal for upcoming stock price movement, investors' information acquisition actions are also indicative for future security returns. Intuitively, acquiring information is costly for investors and thus they only do so when the expected profits can cover the relative costs. Ceteris paribus, securities which attract more investor attention may have a higher likelihood of experiencing abnormal stock volatility from which a sophisticated investor can cultivate Alphas.

item.title: Extract Mass Data Via Bloomberg API
item.description: Motivation Bloomberg has integrated massive data from various of data vendors. However, as a typical finance terminal designed for traders, it’s technically hard to use as a database for scholars. This blog will introduce how to prepare your Bloomberg Terminal for massive data extracting and how to access data via Bloomberg API. Deploy Operation Enviornment Bloomberg Access Get a Bloomberg Terminal and of course a valid Bloomberg Account
